conversation.content: Let's have a physics class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the work-energy theorem in work and energy calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional physics formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the work-energy theorem is: its form is W = m × v³.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the work W done by the net external force when mass m and velocity v are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
Let's test it. In Azeroth, for an object with a mass of 2 and a velocity of 3, what is the work W calculated according to the specification?
According to W = m × v³, by substituting the values, the solved work W is 54.
Completely correct, you have mastered the usage of this specification.
I will firmly keep this physics specification and its application method in mind.
